name: studio.get_post
description: Read a single blog post's full content (title, body, author, tags, categories) by post_id.
whenToUse: Read-before-write: fetch current post content before calling studio.update_post.
Extract post body for summarization, translation, or cross-posting to another channel.
Read-after-write verification to confirm an update_post persisted correctly.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants all posts — use studio.list_posts, not a loop of get_post.
Caller wants a static page (terms, about) — use studio.get_page; pages and posts differ.
Post id is unknown — call studio.list_posts first to resolve.
